title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server that lets you pull, build, and run large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client library for the Ollama API—install from PyPI as ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain partner package adding Ollama LLM and embeddings components to the LangChain ecosystem.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that connects to any Ollama instance via its REST API.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client library for Ollama with reactive and blocking APIs, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings and a local vector DB.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams responses from Ollama models into any Discord server.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration package letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that wraps Ollama for reproducible LLM workflows in CI/CD pipelines.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for the Ollama REST API with async/await and streaming support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama for local LLM conversations.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for local AI-assisted note writing.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel package providing a fluent PHP wrapper around the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt desktop client for Ollama with chat UI and model management.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial Go client for Ollama with idiomatic interfaces and context cancellation.
